title: Stage 05 Peer Review Gate
description: Stage 5 (Peer Code Review) gate. Workstream gates land at pipeline/gates/stage-05.<area>.json (one per area: backend, frontend, platform, qa) and the orchestrator merges them into pipeline/gates/stage-05.json. WRITTEN BY THE approval-derivation HOOK ONLY — never authored by an agent. The hook parses pipeline/code-review/by-<reviewer>.md for REVIEW: APPROVED / REVIEW: CHANGES REQUESTED markers and reconciles approvals/changes_requested on every save. PASS when approvals.length >= required_approvals AND changes_requested is empty.

area.description: Owning area for this review gate. Same value as the gate's workstream field; kept for backwards-compat with consumers that read 'area'. Reviewers must come from a different area; see .devteam/rules/pipeline.md §Stage 5.

review_shape.description: Scoped (one cross-area reviewer, required_approvals=1) when the diff is area-contained; matrix (the v1 cross-review, required_approvals=2) when it spans areas.

required_approvals.description: Approvals needed for PASS. The orchestrator pre-creates the gate with this set; the hook does not change it.

approvals.description: Reviewer names that emitted REVIEW: APPROVED for this area. Hook-managed; agents must not write directly.

changes_requested.description: Reviewers who emitted REVIEW: CHANGES REQUESTED. Non-empty blocks PASS regardless of approvals count.

escalated_to_principal.description: True after the two-round review limit fires and the principal is invoked for a binding ruling.
